- L09773 [NONE] `/* T2b — NT_TRANSACT_NOTIFY_CHANGE (subcommand 0x04)`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09774 [NONE] ` *`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09775 [NONE] ` * Parameter block layout (MS-SMB §2.2.4.61.1):`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09776 [NONE] ` *   0: CompletionFilter (4) — bitmask of FILE_NOTIFY_CHANGE_* bits`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09777 [NONE] ` *   4: Fid              (2)`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09778 [NONE] ` *   6: WatchTree        (1) — non-zero = watch subdirectories`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09779 [NONE] ` *   7: Reserved         (1)`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09780 [NONE] ` *`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09781 [NONE] ` * SMB1 NOTIFY_CHANGE is an asynchronous request: we park the work item`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09782 [NONE] ` * (send_no_response = 1) so the connection stays alive.  When the caller`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09783 [PROTO_GATE|] ` * no longer needs the watch they cancel the MID via SMB_COM_NT_CANCEL.`
  Review: Protocol gate: confirm strict MS-SMB/MS-SMB2 conformance and error codes.
- L09784 [NONE] ` *`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09785 [NONE] ` * Full fsnotify integration would require building an SMB1-format`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09786 [NONE] ` * NT_TRANSACT response with FILE_NOTIFY_INFORMATION records and queuing`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09787 [NONE] ` * it via ksmbd_conn_write().  That infrastructure does not yet exist for`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09788 [NONE] ` * SMB1, so we park the request indefinitely.  Windows clients accept this`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09789 [NONE] ` * — they re-issue the notify periodically or rely on the cancel path.`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
- L09790 [NONE] ` */`
  Review: Low-risk line; verify in surrounding control flow.
